grant_and_term.term: 20 years from 1st day of opening month
grant_and_term.successor: 10 years on then-current terms (may be materially different)

fee_obligations.royalty: 7% of GRR from Channel Bookings, monthly
fee_obligations.electronic_payment: Required via EFT per System Standards

non_curable: Contest IP ownership or attempt registration
Violation of law (including trade restrictions, anti-corruption)
termination_triggers.suspension_rights: Upon default, franchisor may suspend CRS/GDS/ADS, remove from advertising, suspend fee reductions, refuse support

transfer_restrictions.approval_required_for: FA, Hotel assets, Controlling Ownership Interests
conditions: Sign then-current agreement (may be materially different)
transfer_restrictions.no_public_offerings: Neither franchisee nor Controlling Owner may conduct public offering
transfer_restrictions.right_of_first_offer: Only if Exhibit C signed (strategic markets)

default_and_cross_default.cross_default_provision: Consequential Termination applies if 3+ Hyatt FAs terminated for default

noncompete.during_term: No formal covenant; may not be Competing Brand Owner (5+ hotel brand)

guaranty.scope: Personal guarantee by Controlling Ownership Interest holders
guaranty.type: All obligations under FA — monetary and non-monetary

liquidated_damages.formula: Min(60, remaining months) x (3.5% + 7%) x Average Monthly Revenue
liquidated_damages.condemnation_termination: No damages if Termination Agreement signed (with 24-month claw-back)
liquidated_damages.casualty_termination: Optional if cost exceeds Damage Threshold; damages = lesser of formula or Net Recovery

dispute_resolution.arbitration: Mandatory, within 10 miles of Hyatt's principal address (Chicago)
dispute_resolution.governing_law: Illinois (subject to FAA and state overrides)
dispute_resolution.limitation_of_claims: 1 year from discovery (subject to state overrides)

insurance_requirements.failure_penalty: Franchisor may obtain insurance and charge premiums + $200/room/year fee

indemnification.franchisee_indemnifies_franchisor: All claims from application, development, operation, breach, and proportionate share of multi-hotel defenses
indemnification.failure_to_open_on_time: Indemnify for canceled reservations and related costs

distinctive_clauses.description: Hotel operates under franchisee's own tradename with Unbound Collection by Hyatt affiliation — unique 'soft brand' structure
All guest information during term is franchisor's property. Franchisor has unlimited PMS access. Post-term: franchisee may use Hotel-generated guest info stored in PMS.
All innovations relating to Brand Hotels based on Hotel System elements are works-made-for-hire owned by franchisor.

distinctive_clauses.clause: Competing Brand Owner prohibition (not traditional noncompete)
distinctive_clauses.description: Not a traditional noncompete — franchisee may own/operate other hotel brands. But neither franchisee nor management company may be a Competing Brand Owner.
Revenue manager must be certified within 90 days, may manage max 20 Brand Hotels, must have authorized system access.
